headline: Robinson Value Invests $3.6 Million in Beaten-Down Staffing Leader Amid AI Headwinds
summary: Robert Half provides staffing and consulting services worldwide, supporting clients in finance, technology, legal, and creative sectors.

headline: M&T Bank and Verogy Execute Distributed Solar Sale-Leaseback Portfolio, Supported by Energetic Capital
summary: BOSTON, May 05, 2026--Verogy Holdings, LLC, a West Hartford, Connecticut-based distributed energy integrator committed to delivering innovative, best-in-class energy solutions, has completed a sale-leaseback financing with M&T Bank for a portfolio of seven commercial and industrial (C&I) solar projects totaling approximately 2.7 MW across multiple U.S. states.
